alpha_policy.foreground: transparent PNG after local chroma-key removal
alpha_policy.negative: pure white visible pixels on transparent PNG

platform_intent.mask_strategy: do not bake OS rounded corners into the output

app_identity.primary_metaphor: glowing play triangle integrated with film and clapperboard language
app_identity.semantic_orientation: play triangle points right; film elements communicate video/media

style.lighting: dark cinematic lighting with magenta, violet, blue, and warm peach glow
style.texture: smooth gradients, subtle rim light, soft bloom, no text

randomization.angle: main play triangle rotated slightly counterclockwise less than the reference, clapper slate opens from upper-left toward upper-right
randomization.scale: play triangle is slightly smaller relative to the film frame, leaving more visible side film perforations
randomization.position: center of mass shifted a little lower-right from reference
randomization.color: cooler blue-violet frame with coral-pink highlights and a peach-yellow play tip
randomization.decoration_layout: fewer large sparkles, more small purple pin lights clustered around upper-left and lower-right

elements.identity: rounded rectangular film-frame body with side perforations
required_traits: left and right film perforation holes

elements.completeness: bar is visible above the frame and does not merge with the background

elements.identity: curving film strip ribbon crossing lower foreground
required_traits: partial overlap in front of frame
elements.completeness: ribbon may be cropped by canvas edges but must remain readable as film
fills the entire square canvas, fully opaque

relationships.focus: play_triangle remains the visual focus; film frame and clapperboard define the media identity

foreground_exclusions: background particles not attached to the subject

requirements: preserve play triangle, clapper top, film perforation negative spaces

invariants: no text, watermark, UI screen, or device frame
forbidden_changes: literal camera lens replacing the play symbol
flat monochrome UI glyph for the main rendered assets
transparent holes in the background layer
same foreground element duplicated in both layers
failure_criteria: foreground is merely the reference image with background replaced by key color
foreground contains background scenery outside declared subject elements
background includes a ghost or silhouette of the subject
negative icon is solid blob without internal film/play/clapper identity
